meta.title: Should Canada choose the Gripen E over the F-35?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Over the past few months, a surprising debate has been gaining momentum in certain corners of the internet — Which is the best fighter for Canada to replace its aging CF-18 Hornets with: the American-led F-35, or the Swedish-built Gripen E?
